title: The Littlest Rebel
writer: Edwin J. Burke, Edward Peple, Harry Tugend
actors: Shirley Temple, John Boles, Jack Holt
plot: Shirley Temple's father, a rebel officer, sneaks back to his rundown plantation to see his family and is arrested. A Yankee takes pity and sets up an escape. Everyone is captured and the officers are to be executed. Shirley and "B...
